nasb.text: Nevertheless, with most of them God was not well-pleased; for they were laid low in the wilderness.

esv.text: Nevertheless, with most of them God was not pleased, for they were overthrown in the wilderness.

cnv.text: 但他們大多數的人，都得不到　神的喜悅，因此他們都死在曠野。

ccb.text: 尽管如此，他们当中大多数人不讨上帝的喜悦，倒毙在旷野。

csbs.text: 但是神不喜悦他们中的大多数人，所以他们倒毙在旷野。
